form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, was well back in the run when 8th (Fr3) over 2260m at this track beaten 20 m by Holy Camp Dillon (2:45.30) in NR up to 62 on April 1 at $4.60. Before that 6th (Fr1) over 2260m at this track beaten 22 m by Ripp (2:42.50) in No NR on March 28 at $51. Likely to struggle.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth after a quick start, behind Jorge Street at this track over 1730m in a NR up to 90 on April 1 at $8.50. form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start came from midfield and won by 2.5 m as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:44.00) beating Grayson Red in NR up to 80 on April 8 at $3.90 at the bell was 5th-8.82. Hard to leave out on current form. Worth including.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Ripp, who he meets again; was restrained, when 17 metres fifth at this track over 2260m in a No NR race on March 25. Can't have on that basis.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind Cassius Deck at this track over 1730m in a No NR on February 25 at $8. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second after showing early speed, behind Ripp at this track over 2260m in a No NR on March 25 at $15. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Beaten favourite last start when eighth at Riverina Paceway on March 27. Proved too good the start prior at Albion Park on March 14. One of the key runners.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Beaten favourite last start when eighth at Riverina Paceway on March 27. Proved too good the start prior at Albion Park on March 14. One of the key runners.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to the lead passing the 1100m.

form.formComment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; 6th (Fr9) over 1609m after showing early speed and racing wide at Menangle, beaten 11 m by Hi Manameisjeff (1:49.10) in No NR on April 11 at $21. Showed ability the race before when he won by 4.5 m as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:42.50) beating Kanena Provlima in No NR on March 28 at $1.55 at the bell was leading 7.5. Strong winning prospects.
